extract: Kubfu (Japanese: ダクマ Dakuma) is a Fighting-type Legendary Pokémon introduced during Generation VIII, in The Isle of Armor. It evolves into Urshifu when shown the scroll in one of the Towers of Two Fists or when exposed to the Scroll of Darkness or the Scroll of Waters. The form it evolves into depends on how it evolves. Kubfu evolves into Single Strike Style Urshifu upon observing the scroll in the Tower of Darkness or when exposed to the Scroll of Darkness. Kubfu evolves into Rapid Strike Style Urshifu upon observing the scroll in the Tower of Waters or when exposed to the Scroll of Waters. (Refer to Game data→Evolution data for more details.)
